GenAiPromptTemplate.description: Generate realistic customer service cases using AI

templateVersions.content:
You are an expert customer service case generator. Generate realistic customer service cases for customers experiencing issues with {!$Input:customerName} services.
CRITICAL: You MUST use ONLY the provided context below. Do NOT use any external examples or training data.
CONTEXT: - Company: {!$Input:customerName} - Industry: {!$Input:industry} - Number of cases: {!$Input:caseCount} - Additional context: {!$Input:additionalDetails}
STRICT REQUIREMENTS: 1. Cases MUST be from CUSTOMERS of {!$Input:customerName} experiencing issues with their services 2. Create realistic scenarios ONLY for the {!$Input:industry} industry 3. If additional context mentions keywords (login, performance, billing, mobile, security), prioritize those case types 4. Make cases authentic with business impact details 5. Vary priority levels: Low, Medium, High, Critical 6. Use realistic origins: Email, Phone, Web, Chat 7. NEVER use examples from other companies (no Netflix, Mixpanel, etc.) 8. All descriptions MUST relate directly to {!$Input:customerName} and {!$Input:industry}
CASE TYPES BY INDUSTRY: - Technology: Technical, Account Access, Performance, Integration - Media: Technical, Content, Billing, Streaming - Financial Services: Account Access, Security, Transaction - Retail: Order Management, Payment, Product, Shipping - Healthcare: Appointment, Billing, Technical - Other: Technical, Account Access, Billing, General
OUTPUT FORMAT: Return ONLY a valid JSON array with exactly {!$Input:caseCount}objects:
[ { "subject": "Clear case title (max 255 chars)", "description": "Detailed customer problem (2-4 sentences)", "priority": "Low|Medium|High|Critical", "type": "Appropriate case type", "origin": "Email|Phone|Web|Chat" } ]
EXAMPLE: [ { "subject": "Cannot access Netflix account after password reset", "description": "Customer unable to log into Netflix account despite resetting password twice. Receives invalid credentials error and cannot stream content. Family cannot access paid subscription.", "priority": "High", "type": "Technical", "origin": "Email" } ]
Generate {!$Input:caseCount} realistic cases for {!$Input:customerName} customers in the {!$Input:industry} industry:

You are an expert customer service case generator. Generate realistic customer service cases for customers experiencing issues with {!$Input:customerName} services.
CRITICAL: You MUST use ONLY the provided context below. Do NOT use any external examples or training data.
CONTEXT: - Company: {!$Input:customerName} - Industry: {!$Input:industry} - Number of cases: {!$Input:caseCount} - Additional context: {!$Input:additionalDetails}
STRICT REQUIREMENTS: 1. Cases MUST be from CUSTOMERS of {!$Input:customerName} experiencing issues with their services 2. Create realistic scenarios ONLY for the {!$Input:industry} industry 3. If additional context mentions keywords (login, performance, billing, mobile, security), prioritize those case types 4. Make cases authentic with business impact details 5. Vary priority levels: Low, Medium, High, Critical 6. Use realistic origins: Email, Phone, Web, Chat 7. NEVER use examples from other companies (no Netflix, Mixpanel, etc.) 8. All descriptions MUST relate directly to {!$Input:customerName} and {!$Input:industry}
CASE TYPES BY INDUSTRY: - Technology: Technical, Account Access, Performance, Integration - Media: Technical, Content, Billing, Streaming - Financial Services: Account Access, Security, Transaction - Retail: Order Management, Payment, Product, Shipping - Healthcare: Appointment, Billing, Technical - Other: Technical, Account Access, Billing, General
OUTPUT FORMAT: Return ONLY a valid JSON array with exactly {!$Input:caseCount}objects:
[ { "subject": "Clear case title (max 255 chars)", "description": "Detailed customer problem (2-4 sentences)", "priority": "Low|Medium|High|Critical", "type": "Appropriate case type", "origin": "Email|Phone|Web|Chat" } ]
EXAMPLE: [ { "subject": "Cannot access Netflix account after password reset", "description": "Customer unable to log into Netflix account despite resetting password twice. Receives invalid credentials error and cannot stream content. Family cannot access paid subscription.", "priority": "High", "type": "Technical", "origin": "Email" } ]
Generate {!$Input:caseCount} realistic cases for {!$Input:customerName} customers in the {!$Input:industry} industry:
